rationale: This is the right inequality but the provided lemma name/namespace/signature are not correct as stated; mathlib has this for `Finset` (and related `Fintype`/`Set.Finite` contexts), not a bare `Set` with `.card`.
rubric_evidence: Real lemma but WRONG NAMESPACE (e.g. `Set.card_union_le` instead of `Finset.card_union_le`), deprecated, or wrong signature.
